---
title: "Research & Projects"
editor:
  markdown:
    wrap: 72
---

This page has been reorganized into three focused sections. Please use
the **Research & Projects** menu in the navigation bar to view the current
project pages.

## Featured Research

GeoAI, AI for Remote Sensing, ecological remote sensing, wildfire risk
modeling, and remote sensing image interpretation.

- Wildfire Risk Modeling in Southwest China
- Multi-source Remote Sensing Assessment of Wildfire Disturbance and
  Post-fire Ecological Dynamics in Xichang City
- Attention-Enhanced Deep Learning for Remote Sensing Scene
  Classification

[Open Featured Research](research/featured-research.qmd)

## Applied Remote Sensing Research

Public-safe applied remote sensing research experience, including
satellite data preprocessing, fire-related environmental observation,
agricultural monitoring, and crop-yield estimation workflows.

[Open Applied Remote Sensing Research](research/applied-remote-sensing-engineering.qmd)

## Additional GIS & Spatial Analysis

Earlier GIScience and spatial analysis projects involving multi-source
geospatial data, spatial statistics, spatial econometric models, and
urban/regional analysis.

- Multiscale Spatial Patterns and Driving Mechanisms of Homestay
  Development in Liangshan Prefecture
- Integrated Assessment of Urban Development Quality in Jinan City Using
  Multi-source Geospatial Data

[Open Additional GIS & Spatial Analysis](research/additional-gis-spatial-analysis.qmd)

::: {.callout-note}
Detailed contribution statements, figures, datasets, and publication
links will be added as Youbin provides project-specific materials.
:::
